title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at NSE - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at NSE - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at NSE are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Amritsar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About NSE:
NSE is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NSE!
